analysis_processing_hint: Extracting and preparing chart data, please wait.
analysis.empty.hint: Apply a template to generate chart data.
analysis.empty.title: No analysis data
analysisFile.error.exportUnsupportedConf: This Origin export plan is not supported yet.
analysisFile.error.processUnsupportedCon: This extraction config is not supported yet.
analysisFile.error.rcMissingDevices: Rc analysis requires at least one device.
apply_to_new_files_requires_same_config: Template changed. Please Apply to All again.
auto_extract_desc: The system analyzes imported file formats and extracts variables and related parameters automatically. Suitable for standard IV/CV data formats.
calc_group_threshold_voltage_hint: sqrt(|Id|)-Vg linear extrapolation; V-shaped transfer curves are fitted by electron / hole branch.
extractCurveTypeUndeterminedFromVarHints: Unable to determine curve type from Var1/Var2 or nearby headers. Please check the template, or use file-name keywords.
extractPointsCellPositiveInt: Points cell {cell} must contain a positive integer.
extractPointsCellTooLarge: Points from {cell} ({points}) cannot be larger than the X range length ({total}).
extractXNotDivisibleByPoints: X range has {total} points, which is not divisible by points={points}.
extractXNotDivisibleByPointsFromCell: X range has {total} points, which is not divisible by points={points} (from {cell}).
files.createFolderUnsupported: The current import list does not support creating empty folders yet.
files.importUnsupportedPicker: The current browser environment does not support folder selection. Open this page in a standalone Chrome or Edge window, then import again.
files.importUnsupportedWasm: The current browser environment cannot run the preview component. WebAssembly may be disabled. Open this page in a standalone Chrome or Edge window, then import again.
help_changelog_current_body_1: Added a dedicated help window for update logs and user guide content.
help_changelog_current_body_2: Update log entries can be appended in src/cs/workbench/contrib/help/browser/helpContent.ts.
help_changelog_previous_body_1: Improved chart view container layout after applying templates.
help_changelog_previous_body_2: Kept chart and details panes visible when switching from data preview into analysis.
help_changelog_subtitle: Product changes and notes maintained with each release.
help_guide_chart_body_1: Switch IV, GM, SS, and VTH tabs from the chart header.
help_guide_chart_body_2: Use Inspector for second-pass curves and Search in the side bar to locate values.
help_guide_export_body_1: Use the right details pane to configure Origin export, calculated parameters, and curve settings.
help_guide_export_body_2: Origin executable and default plot settings are configured from Settings > Origin.
help_guide_import_body_1: Drag files or folders into the resource manager, or use the import entry to choose local data.
help_guide_import_body_2: Select a file to preview rows before applying extraction templates.
help_guide_subtitle: A concise workflow reference for Conductor Studio.
help_guide_template_body_1: Use auto extraction for quick starts, or select a saved template for repeatable column mapping.
help_guide_template_body_2: Apply all to rebuild results, or apply new files to keep existing processed results.
import.failedToReadSelectedFolder: Failed to read files from the selected folder.
import.failedToRefreshFolder: Failed to refresh files from the selected folder.
import.failureReasonAssessment: The file could not be assessed for import.
import.failureReasonConverterMissing: The Excel conversion component was not found.
import.failureReasonExcelUnavailable: Excel import requires a conversion component.
import.failureReasonFileNotFound: The file no longer exists or cannot be read.
import.failureReasonReadUnknown: The file could not be read.
import.failureReasonUnresolvedPath: The local file path could not be resolved.
import.failureReasonUnsupportedFormat: The file format is not supported.
import.noSupportedDroppedFiles: No supported files found in the selected folder.
import.unsupportedFilesSkipped: Skipped unsupported files in the selected folder. Supported: .csv, .xls, .xlsx
open_in_origin_batch_success: Origin export tasks submitted for {count} thumbnail(s), one standalone Origin window each.
open_in_origin_combined_success: Origin launched, and {curves} curve(s) from {files} file(s) were summarized into one worksheet.
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_batch_succes: Auto open failed ({reason}). Exported a ZIP package with CSV files for {count} thumbnails.
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_failed: Auto open failed, and ZIP fallback export failed: {error}
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_success_with: Auto open failed ({reason}). Exported a ZIP package with CSV data for {curves} curve(s) from {files} file(s).
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_workbook_she: Auto open failed ({reason}). Exported a ZIP package with CSV files for {count} thumbnails.
open_in_origin_success: Origin launched and import task submitted.
open_in_origin_workbook_books_success: Origin export tasks submitted for {count} thumbnail(s) into different workbooks of the same Origin window.
open_in_origin_workbook_sheets_success: Origin export tasks submitted for {count} thumbnail(s) into different worksheets of the same workbook.
origin_canvas_scope_summary_current: The current thumbnail will export as a single result unit.
origin_export_mode_mixed_y_scale_split_h: The current export list mixes Linear and Log Y scales. Origin cannot use both axis types in the same graph layer, so this New columns export will be split into multiple worksheets before plotting.
origin_pick_exe_required: Please select Origin executable path first.
origin_select_canvas: Please select at least one thumbnail first.
origin_zip_export_batch_success: Exported a ZIP package with standalone CSV files for {count} thumbnail(s).
origin_zip_export_success: Exported a ZIP package with CSV data for {curves} curve(s) from {files} file(s).
origin_zip_export_workbook_sheets_succes: Exported a ZIP package with CSV files for {count} thumbnails.
